calendar.matters:
Motion For Reconsideration Re Sanctions
Off Calendar Jul-21-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff's Motion for Reconsideration of Sanctions issued on 11/29/2004, 1/31/2005 and 4/5/2005 to Robert J. Douglas, in the total amount of $1050.00 is scheduled this day. There being no appearance or an objection tentative ruling to grant motion is adopted. Motion is ordered granted. Sanctions are ordered vacated. Order signed. Proceedings reported by: Joyce Long. (212)
